actions.description: Delete documents from the knowledge base by metadata filter.
actions.name: delete

properties.description: The knowledge base to delete documents from.
properties.label: Knowledge Base
properties.name: knowledgeBaseId

properties.description: List of metadata key-value pairs to filter by. Entries within a group are ANDed; groups are ORed.
properties.label: Metadata Filter
properties.name: metadataFilter

actions.title: Delete Documents

actions.description: Loads data into the knowledge base.
actions.name: load

properties.description: The knowledge base to load documents into.
properties.label: Knowledge Base
properties.name: knowledgeBaseId

properties.description: Metadata key-value pairs to attach to the stored documents.
properties.label: Additional Metadata
properties.name: additionalMetadata

actions.title: Load Data

actions.description: Query data from the knowledge base. Supports three modes: tag-only search, vector search, or combined tag filtering with vector search.
actions.name: search

properties.description: The knowledge base to search.
properties.label: Knowledge Base
properties.name: knowledgeBaseId

properties.description: The search query for semantic similarity search. Leave empty for filter-only search.
properties.label: Query
properties.name: query

properties.description: Filter results by tags. Documents with ANY of the selected tags will be returned (OR logic).
properties.label: Tags
properties.name: tagNames

properties.description: List of metadata key-value pairs to filter by. Entries within a group are ANDed; groups are ORed.
properties.label: Metadata Filter
properties.name: metadataFilter

properties.description: Maximum number of results to return.
properties.label: Top K
properties.name: topK

properties.description: Minimum similarity score (0.0 to 1.0). Only results with similarity above this threshold will be returned.
properties.label: Similarity Threshold
properties.name: similarityThreshold

actions.title: Search Data

actions.description: Updates documents in the knowledge base by deleting existing ones matching the selected document or chunk and loading new ones.
actions.name: update

properties.description: Whether to update multiple documents or chunks.
properties.label: Update Multiple
properties.name: updateMultiple

properties.description: The knowledge base to update documents in.
properties.label: Knowledge Base
properties.name: knowledgeBaseId

properties.description: The document to update in the knowledge base.
properties.label: Document
properties.name: knowledgeBaseDocumentId

properties.description: The specific chunk to update. If not selected, all chunks of the selected document will be replaced.
properties.label: Document Chunk
properties.name: knowledgeBaseDocumentChunkId

properties.description: Additional metadata key-value pairs to add to the stored documents.
properties.label: Additional Metadata
properties.name: additionalMetadata

properties.description: List of metadata key-value pairs to filter by. Entries within a group are AND-ed; groups are OR-ed.
properties.label: Metadata Filter
properties.name: metadataFilter

properties.description: The text content to update the knowledge base with. If not provided, uses the configured document reader.
properties.label: Content
properties.name: content

actions.title: Update Documents

clusterElements.name: search
clusterElements.description: Search data from the knowledge base.

properties.description: The knowledge base to search.
properties.label: Knowledge Base
properties.name: knowledgeBaseId

properties.description: Filter results by tags. Documents with ANY of the selected tags will be returned (OR logic).
properties.label: Tags
properties.name: tagNames

properties.description: The query to be executed.
properties.label: Query
properties.name: query

properties.description: The top 'k' similar results to return.
properties.label: Top K
properties.name: topK

properties.description: Similarity threshold score to filter the search response by. Only documents with similarity score equal or greater than the threshold will be returned. A threshold value of 0 means any similarity is accepted. A threshold value of 1 means an exact match is required.
properties.label: Similarity Threshold
properties.name: similarityThreshold

clusterElements.title: Knowledge Base Search

clusterElements.name: update
clusterElements.description: Updates documents in the knowledge base by deleting existing ones matching the selected document or chunk and loading new text content.

properties.description: Whether to update multiple documents or chunks.
properties.label: Update Multiple
properties.name: updateMultiple

properties.description: The knowledge base to update documents in.
properties.label: Knowledge Base
properties.name: knowledgeBaseId

properties.description: The document to update in the knowledge base.
properties.label: Document
properties.name: knowledgeBaseDocumentId

properties.description: The specific chunk to update. If not selected, all chunks of the selected document will be replaced.
properties.label: Document Chunk
properties.name: knowledgeBaseDocumentChunkId

properties.description: Additional metadata key-value pairs to add to the stored documents.
properties.label: Additional Metadata
properties.name: additionalMetadata

properties.description: List of metadata key-value pairs to filter by. Entries within a group are AND-ed; groups are OR-ed.
properties.label: Metadata Filter
properties.name: metadataFilter

properties.description: The text content to store in the knowledge base.
properties.label: Content
properties.name: content

clusterElements.title: Update Knowledge Base Documents

properties.description: The knowledge base to retrieve documents from.
properties.label: Knowledge Base
properties.name: knowledgeBaseId

properties.description: Filter results by tags. Documents with ANY of the selected tags will be returned (OR logic).
properties.label: Tags
properties.name: tagNames

description: Search ByteChef's internal knowledge base to retrieve relevant document chunks using semantic similarity search powered by vector embeddings.
name: knowledgeBase
title: Knowledge Base
